name: Keewano
description: AI analytics platform for mobile games with LLM-powered agents and proprietary time-series database (keewanoDB).

seo.title: Keewano — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Keewano: AI analytics platform for mobile games with LLM-powered agents and proprietary time-series database (keewanoDB).

when_to_use: LLM-powered analytics agents for mobile game live ops decision-making
Time-series game event analysis with proprietary keewanoDB for fast querying
AI-assisted player behavior insights for game retention optimization
Automated anomaly detection in game telemetry with NLP query interface

pros: LLM-powered agents for ad-hoc game analytics
Purpose-built time-series database for game events
Aimed squarely at mobile game KPIs
Modern UX focused on question-first analysis
cons: Young product with limited public track record
Not a full MMP — pairs with attribution vendors
review.verdict: Interesting AI-first analytics for mobile games, but still early — do not bet your sole attribution stack on it.
review.best_for: Mobile game studios experimenting with LLM-driven analytics on top of existing MMP data.
review.not_for: Teams that need a proven, audited attribution system as system of record.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
